title: hieracium subfariniramum
intro: Hieracium subfariniramum, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Hawkweed has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers. Hawkweed is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its effectiveness and safety should be evaluated under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
